headline: Conversion therapy programmes operate in 7 states
context: Human rights monitoring found that government-linked conversion therapy programmes for LGBTQ individuals operated in at least 7 Malaysian states in 2024.

cards.big: Government-linked conversion therapy operates in 7 states targeting LGBTQ persons
cards.sub: JAKIM-endorsed 'mukhayyam' programmes claim to 'rehabilitate' sexual orientation

cards.big: No Malaysian law explicitly authorises or prohibits conversion therapy
cards.sub: Programmes operate under religious rehabilitation mandates without medical oversight

cards.big: WHO declared conversion therapy harmful and ineffective in 2023 statement
cards.sub: 17 countries have enacted full or partial bans on conversion practices

cards.big: 240 individuals underwent state-linked conversion programmes in 2024
cards.sub: 67% of participants reported worsened mental health after completion

cards.big: State-funded programmes that harm participants are not rehabilitation
Malaysian Psychiatric Association distanced itself from conversion therapy in 2023
